name: magnence-platform
description: Full-stack software agency platform (web + api + mobile) with Supabase storage

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@magnence/types && npm run build --workspace=@magnence/db && npm run build --workspace=@magnence/ui && npm run build --workspace=@magnence/email && npm run build --workspace=@magnence/api && npm run build --workspace=@magnence/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@magnence/web && npm run lint --workspace=@magnence/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@magnence/types && npm run typecheck --workspace=@magnence/db && npm run typecheck --workspace=@magnence/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@magnence/web && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/mobile
